topic: I look years older in every photo taken of me within the same week.
title: I Age Years in Every Photo | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: In every new photo of me, I look years older.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of framed photographs on a hallway wall, the same person aging across them, dim light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It started with a group picture at a friend's kitchen table.
scenes.image_prompt: A printed group photo lying on a wooden kitchen table, low light, faded colors, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I was the only one who aged.
scenes.image_prompt: A single figure circled in a faded photograph, the others unchanged, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By Wednesday my reflection still looked normal, but the pictures lied.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom mirror beside a taped photo, the printed face far older, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started counting the new lines.
scenes.image_prompt: Hands holding a glossy photo print under a desk lamp, deep shadow around the edges, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Six photos in six days, and each one older than before.
scenes.image_prompt: Six photographs laid in a row on a dark desk, progressively aged, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked someone to photograph me again.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone raised to take a portrait in a dim living room, blurred figure, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new one showed gray hair I do not have.
scenes.image_prompt: A close photo print of gray hair at a temple, the surrounding person younger, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each picture now ages faster than the last.
scenes.image_prompt: A scattered pile of portraits on the floor, faces increasingly old, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yesterday's photo showed an empty chair where I had been sitting.
scenes.image_prompt: A photograph of an empty wooden chair in a lit room, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stopped letting anyone take my picture at all.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand covering a phone camera lens in a darkened room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The photos were never showing me older. They were counting down.
scenes.image_prompt: A final faded photograph half burned at the edges on a dark surface, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
